name: Football Trivia
description: Fun trivia questions about Demo Brand history, players, records, and Croatian football. Educational and engaging for fans of all ages.

question.example: In which year did Demo Brand win the Inter-Cities Fairs Cup?

fun_fact.example: Demo Brand defeated Leeds United over two legs in the 1967 Fairs Cup Final, becoming the first Yugoslav club to win a European trophy!

guidelines: Slide 1: Question with 4 multiple choice options. Slide 2: Answer reveal with a fun fact and additional context. Use a quiz-show inspired design with bold typography. Number each trivia post for series continuity (#1, #2, etc.). Encourage fans to answer before swiping. Post on non-matchdays to fill the content calendar.
